title: orthochilus leontoglossus
intro: Orthochilus leontoglossus, also known as the Leopard's Tongue Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Orthochilus leontoglossus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The leaves can be prepared for herbal use by drying or boiling them to create teas or infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential medicinal applications.
